7 #pragma once
8 
9 #include <arcane/Item.h>
10 #include <arcane/ItemEnumerator.h>
11 #ifdef USE_ARCANE_V3
12 #include <arcane/ItemLocalId.h>
13 #endif
14 
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/AuDi/audi.h"
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Contribution/Contribution.h"
17 
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 
21 namespace ArcNum {
22 
23  namespace Stencil {
24 
25  class Item
26  {
27  public:
28  Item()
29  : m_size(1)
30  , m_index(0) {}
31  Item(Arcane::Integer size, Arcane::Integer index)
32  : m_size(size)
33  , m_index(index)
34  {
35  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_index < m_size),("index / size error in item of a stencil"));
36  }
37  Item(const Item& item)
38  : m_size(item.m_size)
39  , m_index(item.m_index) {}
40  Item& operator=(const Item& item)
41  {
42  m_size = item.m_size;
43  m_index = item.m_index;
44  return *this;
45  }
46  Arcane::Integer size() const { return m_size; }
47  Arcane::Integer index() const { return m_index; }
48  private:
49  Arcane::Integer m_size;
50  Arcane::Integer m_index;
51  };
52 
53  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
54  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
55 
56  template<typename T>
57  class ItemT;
58 
59  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
60  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
61 
62  template<>
63  class ItemT<Arcane::Cell>
64  : public Item
65  {
66  public:
67  ItemT() {}
68  ItemT(Arcane::Cell cell)
69  : m_cell(cell) {}
70  ItemT(Arcane::Cell cell,
71  Arcane::Integer size,
72  Arcane::Integer index)
73  : Item(size, index)
74  , m_cell(cell) {}
75  ItemT(const ItemT<Arcane::Cell>& cell)
76  : Item(cell)
77  , m_cell(cell.m_cell) {}
78  operator const Arcane::Cell&() const { return m_cell; }
79  const Arcane::Cell& cell() const { return m_cell; }
80  Arcane::Integer localId() const { return m_cell.localId(); }
81  bool isOwn() const { return m_cell.isOwn(); }
82  #ifdef USE_ARCANE_V3
83  inline Arcane::ItemInternal* internal() const { return m_cell.internal(); }
84  #endif
85  private:
86  Arcane::Cell m_cell;
87  };
88 
89  typedef ItemT<Arcane::Cell> Cell;
90 
91  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
92  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
93 
94  template<>
95  class ItemT<Arcane::Node>
96  : public Item
97  {
98  public:
99  ItemT() {}
100  ItemT(Arcane::Node node)
101  : m_node(node) {}
102  ItemT(Arcane::Node node,
103  Arcane::Integer size,
104  Arcane::Integer index)
105  : Item(size, index)
106  , m_node(node) {}
107  ItemT(const ItemT<Arcane::Node>& node)
108  : Item(node)
109  , m_node(node.m_node) {}
110  operator const Arcane::Node&() const { return m_node; }
111  const Arcane::Node& node() const { return m_node; }
112  Arcane::Integer localId() const { return m_node.localId(); }
113  #ifdef USE_ARCANE_V3
114  inline Arcane::ItemInternal* internal() const { return m_node.internal(); }
115  #endif
116  bool isOwn() const { return m_node.isOwn(); }
117  private:
118  Arcane::Node m_node;
119  };
120 
121  typedef ItemT<Arcane::Node> Node;
122 
123  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
124  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
125 
126  template<>
127  class ItemT<Arcane::Face>
128  : public Item
129  {
130  public:
131  ItemT(Arcane::Face face)
132  : m_face(face)
133  , m_cells(m_face.cells())
134  , m_nb_cells(m_cells.size()) {}
135  ItemT(const Arcane::ItemEnumeratorT<Arcane::Face>& face)
136  : m_face(*face)
137  , m_cells(m_face.cells())
138  , m_nb_cells(m_cells.size()) {}
139  ItemT(Arcane::Face face,
140  Arcane::Integer size,
141  Arcane::Integer index)
142  : Item(size, index)
143  , m_face(face)
144  , m_cells(m_face.cells())
145  , m_nb_cells(m_cells.size()) {}
146  ItemT(const Arcane::ItemEnumeratorT<Arcane::Face>& face,
147  Arcane::Integer size,
148  Arcane::Integer index)
149  : Item(size, index)
150  , m_face(*face)
151  , m_cells(m_face.cells())
152  , m_nb_cells(m_cells.size()) {}
153  operator const Arcane::Face&() const { return m_face; }
154  Cell backCell() const { return Cell(m_cells[0], m_nb_cells, 0); }
155  Cell frontCell() const { return Cell(m_cells[1], m_nb_cells, 1); }
156  Cell boundaryCell() const { return backCell(); }
157  Arcane::Integer localId() const { return m_face.localId(); }
158  bool isOwn() const { return m_face.isOwn(); }
159  bool isSubDomainBoundary() const { return m_face.isSubDomainBoundary(); }
160  #ifdef USE_ARCANE_V3
161  inline Arcane::ItemInternal* internal() const { return m_face.internal(); }
162  #endif
163  private:
164  Arcane::Face m_face;
165  Arcane::CellVectorView m_cells;
166  Arcane::Integer m_nb_cells;
167  };
168 
169  typedef ItemT<Arcane::Face> Face;
170 
171  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
172  /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
173 
174  template<>
175  class ItemT<Arcane::Integer>
176  : public Item
177  {
178  public:
179  ItemT(Arcane::Integer id,
180  Arcane::Integer size,
181  Arcane::Integer index)
182  : Item(size, index)
183  , m_id(id) {}
184  operator const Arcane::Integer&() const { return m_id; }
185  #ifdef USE_ARCANE_V3
186  inline Arcane::ItemLocalId internal() const { return Arcane::ItemLocalId(m_id); }
187  #endif
188  private:
189  Arcane::Integer m_id;
190  };
191 
192  typedef ItemT<Arcane::Integer> IntegerIndex;
193 
194  }
195 }
